communities.name: AI Tinkerers Geneva
communities.description: New Geneva chapter of the world's largest AI builder community, launching at SDG Solution Space. Follows the AI Tinkerers Lausanne model (400+ engineers engaged at EPFL over 2 years).
communities.whyTarget: Launching May 13, 2026 in Sonar's home city. The chapter launch announcement explicitly names Sonar as part of Geneva's tech ecosystem. No code quality tool currently sponsors any Swiss AI community — founding sponsorship locks in the category and unlocks visibility across the 220+ city global AI Tinkerers network downstream. Time-sensitive.

communities.description: One of the largest global AI Tinkerers chapters, at Merantix AI Campus. Zed and Vercel are active sponsors.

communities.description: 1,532 members, bi-monthly at 42 Berlin, Merantix, w3 Hub.

communities.name: PyData Berlin
communities.description: One of Europe's largest data science communities. Annual 3-day conference draws up to 500.

communities.name: AI Tinkerers Paris
communities.description: 1,967 technical members including CTOs and founders. Feb 2025 Anthropic hackathon at Station F drew 419+ attendees.

communities.name: Paris ML Applications Group

communities.name: AI On The Amstel
communities.description: 200–300 attendees/month — largest monthly AI event in Amsterdam. Nov 2025 CTO panel on "AI generated code" at Booking.com is directly Sonar-relevant.

communities.name: AI Tinkerers Amsterdam
communities.description: 692 technical members with monthly meetups + hackathons. Auth0's "AI safety, trust, and security" demo night aligns with Sonar messaging.

communities.name: AI Native Netherlands

communities.description: Active for 2 years at EPFL Innovation Park with 400+ engineers/researchers engaged. Actively seeking sponsors.

communities.name: AI Tinkerers Zürich
communities.description: Monthly demos and talks at ETH Student Project House. Zero AI coding tool sponsors despite Anthropic/OpenAI/Google DeepMind Zurich offices — critical gap.

communities.name: Zürich AI Club
communities.description: Six additional Swiss communities: Zurich AI Club (1,580 members at AWS Zurich and ETH AI Center); Zurich AI Festival (Sep 29–Oct 4, 2025, 5,000+ attendees across 25+ events, organized by ETH AI Center); Generative AI Genève (318 members, growing); Mindstone Geneva (monthly); YAIL Zurich (monthly + dinners with Bern/Geneva/Lausanne hubs); AI Suisse (Switzerland's largest AI community, first Swiss DeepLearning.AI ambassador).
